linapro-storage-obs.name: Object Storage - Huawei Cloud OBS
linapro-storage-obs.description: Provides an Huawei Cloud OBS backend for the host Storage domain capability.

settings.description: Enter your Huawei Cloud OBS access keys and bucket below. Enable only one cloud storage plugin at a time. If the configuration is incomplete, object storage operations will fail—the system will not automatically switch to local disk.
settings.accessKeyIdHelp: Cloud access key identity used by the provider SDK.
settings.secretAccessKeyHelp: Cloud secret key. Leave empty to keep the previously saved value.
settings.secretAccessKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the saved secret
settings.regionHelp: Cloud region for the target bucket.
settings.endpointHelp: Optional custom API endpoint (private network, accelerate, or private network or accelerate domain).
settings.pathPrefixHelp: Optional key prefix applied under the host-scoped object key.
settings.forcePathStyleHelp: Use path-style addressing (required by many MinIO and S3-compatible endpoints).
